detector_note: IncToDec(default,wait=20,pval=0=>inactive): IsNeedStop iff !IsEmpty && CurrentPValue<Threshold; pval=exp(-0.5/max(ExpInc/max(LocalMax-Last,1e-10),1e-10)). Iter==IncToDec threshold=1.0 (stops od_wait after best). Wilcoxon over post-local-max deltas. maxIsOptimal=false for a loss metric (err negated). tree_count_ is the STOP iteration; best_iteration_ the use_best_model best.
staged_layout: flat f64: per-iteration RMSE on the EVAL set (the detector's AddError sequence); n_iterations_run entries.
